MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF SCOTT MAHALICK MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, in light of stay order issued April 16, 2010. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Stay Or Dismiss
Off Calendar Apr-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS ENTERCOM COMMUNICATIONS CORP., ENTERCOM SAN FRANCISCO LLC, ENTERCOM SEATTLE LLC, and, DWIGHT WALKER Motion to Stay or Dismiss. Quin E. Marshall, Esq. of Fitzgerald Abbott & Beardsley LLP (510) 451-3300 specially appearing for Plaintiff; Marie A. Trimble, Esq. of Gordon & Rees LLP (415) 986-5900 appearing for Defendants and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted in part. This action is stayed pending the outcome of the earlier filed action in United States District Court for the District of Oregon entitled Entercom, et al vs. Scott Mahalick, Case number CV 09-1050 HA. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Carlito Mandia, CSR # 9689
